channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Most Americans see Iran as an enemy but doubt Trump’s judgment on military force, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll finds that as the U.S. and Iran head into their next round of nuclear talks in Geneva, many U.S. adults continue to view Iran’s nuclear program as a threat.

item.title: What to know about the LA superintendent whose home was searched by FBI
Memorial services for Jesse Jackson begin at Chicago headquarters of his civil rights organization
